# Deny-listed patterns (extended regex, one per line) for scripts/ci/check-private-references.sh.
# This repository is public: links/references that resolve to private DSB repositories or
# internal-only hosts must never appear in tracked files or commit messages.
#
# Private GitHub org (all repos in it are private):
github\.com[:/]dsb-infra
dsb-infra\.github\.io
